title: ophrys myodes
side_effects: Ophrys myodes can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. Ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, and may cause liver or kidney damage in severe cases. Prolonged exposure to the plant's pollen or oils can trigger anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction, and may worsen conditions such as asthma or eczema. Improper use of the plant can also interact with certain medications, increasing the risk of adverse interactions and health complications.
